name: Plastic Expandable Long Tool Drawer Organizer Gray - Brightroom™
description:
Organize long tools nicely inside a drawer with the Plastic Expandable Long Tool Drawer Organizer from Brightroom™. This gray tool organizer is designed in a rectangle shape to give you enough space for tools and fits nicely inside a drawer. Made of BPA-free plastic, this long tool organizer is expandable to meet your storage needs and can be hand washed to clean.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
